calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Plaintiff Weisberg & Miller'S Prove-Up Hearing For Judgment Against Defendant Brent Kirsten
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Brent Kirsten.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

William S. Weisberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Weisberg & Miller.
Mr. Weisberg was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Brent Kirsten.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on June 11, 2018 and personally served on defendant Brent Kirsten on February 5, 2019.
Default as to defendant Brent Kirsten was entered on March 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 28, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Weisberg & Miller, and against the defaulted defendant Brent Kirsten, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,067.66.
Attorney Fees - $3,819.50.
Costs - $709.65.

Total - $44,596.81.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Continued To Apr-07-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
